reviews.review_description: I could spend all day just making new song loops. The ear training gets hard, but I think I'm getting better. Overall, it's a fun way to learn music.

reviews.review_title: Fun music games and easy to learn
reviews.review_description: This app made it really easy to practice rhythm and pitches! It's great for exposing kids to some early music concepts too. So much better than wasting time on music games that don't really teach you anything.
